list.question: Do I need a partner?
list.answer: No! We switch partners during class so everyone gets to dance with everyone. It's the best way to learn!

list.question: What shoes should I wear?
list.answer: Comfortable shoes that slide a little bit are best. Avoid sneakers with too much grip.

list.question: I have two left feet. Can I join?
list.answer: Absolutely! Our beginner classes assume zero dance experience. We'll get you moving in no time.
